subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of the Sovereign Lord of the realm of oneness! The days of the Manifestation were as the radiance of Mount Sinai, when the light shone forth, a time of joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای حضرت سلطان عرصه توحید ایام ظهور مجلی طور اشراق نور بود و یوم سرور
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
